title: Absolute No Explosion
description: Absolute No Explosion makes explosion particles disseapear!
body:
## 💥 No Explosion Particles 💥

Ever get tired of your screen being flooded with explosion particles? This resource pack removes all explosion particle effects, giving you a much cleaner and clearer visual experience ✨

- 🔥 What this pack does:
- 🚫 Completely removes explosion particles
- 👀 Improves visibility during combat, TNT usage, and mob fights
- 🎮 Keeps gameplay clean and distraction-free
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
- 🧨 Explosions will still happen — you just won’t see the messy particles anymore!
